llm_payload.name: Douglas College President's Office

llm_payload.extra: Dr. Kathy Denton is the President and CEO, and was formerly Vice President Academic and Provost. Devon Smith is the Executive Assistant, President and College Board and the key contact for the office.

title: Patty Hambler joins Douglas College senior management | Douglas ...

llm_payload.name: Patty Hambler
llm_payload.description: Patty Hambler has been appointed Associate Vice President, Student Affairs at Douglas College. She will focus on services that support students, including student housing, health promotion, mental wellness, student life, and Indigenization efforts. She joined Douglas College in 2020 as Director of Student Affairs and Services.
llm_payload.address: 700 Royal Avenue, New Westminster, B.C. V3M 5Z5
